name: EuiColorPaletteDisplay
visualDescription: A thin horizontal bar (~24px tall) that renders a color gradient or series of fixed color blocks side-by-side to preview a palette. It is read-only and purely visual. NOT EuiColorPalettePicker (the display variant shows the palette but does not allow selection).

type.description:
Specify the type of palette.
`gradient`: each color fades into the next.
`fixed`: individual color blocks.

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

palette.description: Array of color `strings` or an array of {@link PaletteColorStop}. The stops must be numbers in an ordered range.
